items.content_html: All my dotfiles, using Neovim with PowerShell Core in the Windows Terminal along with fzf and a wrapper for it for fast navigation. Additionally, there is a quick setup for Firefox with Tridactyl and for a Tiling Window Manager using Komorebi with Yasb and AutoHotkey.
